research_session.query: Building effective AI agents system - NLP to production agents using Claude Code CLI

summary: Building effective AI agents system - NLP to production agents using Claude Code CLI

features.description: Create platxa-agent-generator skill with SKILL.md entry point
features.rationale: Core skill structure following Anthropic Agent Skills specification

features.description: Implement NLP parser to extract agent requirements from natural language
features.rationale: NL2Agent requires structured extraction from free-form descriptions

verification.criteria: Parser extracts agent name, type, tools, and description

features.description: Create agent type classifier (simple, orchestrator, multi-agent, pipeline)
features.rationale: Different agent types require different generation patterns

verification.criteria: Classifier correctly identifies agent type from description

features.description: Build discovery subagent for researching domain patterns
features.rationale: Discovery phase needs web research and pattern analysis capabilities

features.description: Create architecture subagent for determining agent structure
features.rationale: Architecture decisions require analysis of patterns and best practices

features.description: Implement generation subagent for creating agent files
features.rationale: File generation requires Claude Code-specific knowledge

features.description: Build validation subagent for quality checks
features.rationale: Production agents require rigorous validation

verification.criteria: Subagent validates syntax, security, and completeness

features.description: Create prompt-chaining pattern template generator
features.rationale: Prompt chaining is fundamental pattern for task decomposition

features.description: Implement routing pattern template generator
features.rationale: Routing enables separation of concerns and specialized handling

features.description: Build orchestrator-workers pattern template generator
features.rationale: Most powerful pattern for dynamic task decomposition

verification.criteria: Generates valid orchestrator with worker spawning

features.description: Create evaluator-optimizer pattern template generator
features.rationale: Essential for tasks requiring iterative refinement

features.description: Implement parallelization pattern template generator
features.rationale: Parallelization maximizes efficiency for independent subtasks

verification.criteria: Generates agents with parallel Task tool calls

features.description: Create agent.md file generator with valid frontmatter
features.rationale: Claude Code agents require specific file format

verification.criteria: Generated files have valid YAML frontmatter

features.description: Build system prompt generator based on agent type and purpose
features.rationale: System prompt quality directly impacts agent effectiveness

verification.criteria: System prompts are clear, specific, and effective

features.description: Implement tool selection logic based on agent requirements
features.rationale: Appropriate tool selection is critical for agent function

verification.criteria: Tool list matches agent capabilities needed

features.description: Create CLAUDE.md generator for agent-specific context
features.rationale: CLAUDE.md enables project-specific agent behavior

features.description: Build MCP server configuration generator
features.rationale: MCP enables external system integration

features.description: Implement slash command generator for agent invocation
features.rationale: Slash commands provide user-friendly agent access

features.description: Create hooks generator for compliance and logging
features.rationale: Enterprise agents need audit trails and compliance

features.description: Build agent syntax validator
features.rationale: Syntax errors prevent agent loading

features.description: Implement security scanner for agent definitions
features.rationale: Agents should not enable security vulnerabilities

verification.criteria: Detects dangerous patterns and tool combinations

features.description: Create completeness checker for agent definitions
features.rationale: Incomplete agents may fail at runtime

features.description: Build quality scorer for generated agents
features.rationale: Quality gates prevent low-quality agents from deployment

features.description: Implement test harness for agent invocation testing
features.rationale: Agents should be tested before deployment

verification.criteria: Can invoke agent and verify response

features.description: Create dry-run mode for agent generation
features.rationale: Users should preview before committing changes

verification.criteria: Shows what would be created without creating

features.description: Build installation script for user scope agents
features.rationale: User scope agents are available across all projects

features.description: Create installation script for project scope agents
features.rationale: Project scope agents are shared with team

features.description: Implement agent catalog for pre-built agents
features.rationale: Pre-built agents accelerate adoption

features.description: Create code-reviewer agent template
features.rationale: Common use case for Claude Code agents

features.description: Build research-agent template with web search
features.rationale: Research agents demonstrated in Claude SDK

features.description: Create documentation-agent template
features.rationale: Documentation is common automation need

features.description: Implement test-writer-agent template
features.rationale: Test writing is high-value automation

features.description: Build refactoring-agent template
features.rationale: Refactoring benefits from subagent parallelization

features.description: Create security-scanner-agent template
features.rationale: Security analysis is critical capability

features.description: Implement workflow state machine for generation phases
features.rationale: State machine ensures consistent workflow

features.description: Build state persistence in .claude/ directory
features.rationale: Long workflows need persistence for resume

features.description: Create progress tracking and display system
features.rationale: Complex generation needs progress visibility

features.description: Implement interactive mode with AskUserQuestion
features.rationale: User input improves generation quality

features.description: Build extended thinking integration for complex decisions
features.rationale: Extended thinking improves architecture decisions

features.description: Create references directory with pattern documentation
features.rationale: Reference docs guide generation quality

features.description: Implement multi-agent system generator
features.rationale: Multi-agent is key differentiator

features.description: Build agent composition feature for combining agents
features.rationale: Composition enables complex behaviors

verification.criteria: Agents can invoke other agents as subagents

features.description: Create agent versioning and update system
features.rationale: Production agents need version control

verification.criteria: Agents can be versioned and updated

features.description: Implement agent export for sharing
features.rationale: Sharing agents builds ecosystem

verification.criteria: Agents can be exported as packages

features.description: Build comprehensive test suite for generator
features.rationale: Generator reliability requires testing

features.description: Create documentation with examples and tutorials
features.rationale: Good docs drive adoption

verification.criteria: Users can follow docs to create agents

features.description: Implement CLI interface for standalone usage
features.rationale: CLI enables automation and scripting

features.description: Create GitHub Actions workflow for validation
features.rationale: CI ensures quality for contributions
